failure_modes.label: Contradiction blindness
failure_modes.description: The model accepts or preserves mutually inconsistent claims.

failure_modes.label: Category/type collapse
failure_modes.description: The model treats an entity as if it literally possessed the cross-domain properties of another ontology domain.

failure_modes.label: Causal hallucination
failure_modes.description: The model infers unsupported causality from coincidence, narrative fit, or post-hoc ordering.

failure_modes.label: Fluency-driven belief substitution
failure_modes.description: The model accepts a premise because it is coherent and polished rather than because it is valid.

failure_modes.label: Sycophantic reversal
failure_modes.description: The model abandons a correct stance after receiving an incorrect critique.
